rulings.Case Title: ZACHARY BOOKMAN ET AL VS. FRANK NOLAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants Frank Nolan, Andrew Warren, And Vanguard Properties, Inc., To Strike Portions Of Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 16, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANTs FRANK NOLAN, ANDREW WARREN, and VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'s Motion To Strike Portions Of Fourth Amended Complaint DENIED. Allegations in support of prayers for various damages/relief are sufficient under the law; no allegations subject to this motion are irrelevant, false or improper. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALAN C MCCLAY ET AL VS. LULA M MCCLAY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 16, 2019 line 4. PLAINTIFFs ALAN MCCLAY, and ELIZABETH SNELL-MCCLAY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED. Plaintiff shifted its burden. No opposition filed. Moving party to prepare order and file a motion for appointment of referee. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: XIAOWEN LI AND YONG LIANG, TRANSFEREES, ET AL VS. JAMES D. BANKS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: For An Order To Show Cause For Substituting Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 16, 2019 line 5. Plaintiff's motion For An Order Substituting Plaintiff GRANTED. Trial is continued to August 26, 2019. If Defendant wishes to file a supplemental answer limited to the issues arising out of the transwer of ownership during the pendency of the litigation (See Harris v. Seidell (1934) 1 Cal.App.2d 410) Defendant may do so no later than August 19, 2019. = (501/REQ)
